headline: Joby Aviation Incurs Loss in Q1, Surpasses Revenue Estimates
summary: JOBY's first-quarter 2026 loss matches estimates, and the company expects 2026 revenues in the range of $105M-$115M.

headline: Why Rocket Lab Stock Is No Longer Just A Launch Story
summary: Rocket Lab (RKLB) has undergone a fundamental valuation rerating, with its stock delivering a 240 percent return over the past year to reach a 45.4 billion dollar market capitalization. (See why RKLB stock moved). The Q1 2026 results indicate that the company has transitioned from its origins as a small-cap launch provider into a large-cap aerospace prime mover. Revenue surged 63.5 percent year-over-year to a record $200.3 million, surpassing the $193.5 million consensus estimate. This growth is
